name: owlspotlight
description: Highlight similar code snippets using semantic search.

owlspotlight.modelName.description: Hugging Face model name used for embeddings

owlspotlight.batchSize.description: Batch size for code embedding (Python server). Larger values may speed up indexing but use more memory.

owlspotlight.cacheSettings.title: Cache Settings
owlspotlight.cacheSettings.description: Configure cache behavior for better performance

autoClearCache.description: Automatically clear server cache when starting the server (clears .owl_index directory)

autoClearLocalCache.description: Automatically clear local cache files when starting the server

cachePath.description: Custom cache directory path (leave empty to use default model_server directory)

clearCacheOnCommand.description: Manual cache clear trigger - Check this box to clear cache immediately (.owl_index directory and local cache files). Setting will automatically return to unchecked after execution.

autoRemoveVenv.description: Automatically remove existing virtual environment before setup. WARNING: This will delete all installed packages!

pythonVersion.description: Python version or interpreter path for uv to use when creating the virtual environment

owlspotlight.enableJapaneseTranslation.description: Translate Japanese search queries to English before searching

owlspotlight.geminiApiKey.description: Google Gemini API key for translation

owlspotlight.geminiModel.description: Gemini model used for Japanese query translation

owlspotlight.serverHost.description: Host/IP address the OwlSpotlight search server binds to and the extension connects to. Default 127.0.0.1 (localhost). Note: codex/MCP integration expects 127.0.0.1:8000 unless OWLSPOTLIGHT_SERVER_URL is set. Restart the server after changing this.

owlspotlight.serverPort.description: Local server port for the OwlSpotlight search server. If the port is busy, the next available port is used automatically. Restart the server after changing this.

owlspotlight.autoStartServer.description: Automatically start the search server when the extension activates (requires .venv to be set up)

owlspotlight.autoIndexOnFileChange.description: Automatically refresh the incremental index when supported source files are created, changed, or deleted while the server is running

owlspotlight.highlightColors.title: Highlight Colors
owlspotlight.highlightColors.description: Customize highlight colors for code navigation results. Use CSS rgba() format, e.g. rgba(255,140,0,0.18).

jumpLine.description: Color of the exact function definition line you jumped to (gold)

standaloneFunction.description: Background color for a standalone function body (orange)

classMethod.description: Background color for a class method body (blue)

classBody.description: Background color for the entire enclosing class body (subtle green)

classHeader.description: Background color for the class definition line (green)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
